methods.name: SetWebviewer
methods.description: Sets the Webviewer to use, attach the component block

methods.name: FileType
methods.description: Returns file type for picking files for upload. Will only apply if selecting from Shared Directories.

methods.name: ZoomControls
methods.description: Set true or false for ZoomControls in the webviewer - true by default.

methods.name: WideViewportMode
methods.description: Set true or false for WideViewPort in the webviewer, that is, enable support for the viewport HTML meta tag or should use a wide viewport - true by default.

methods.name: LoadWithOverviewMode
methods.description: Set true or false for LoadWithOverview in the webviewer, that is, zooms out the content to fit on screen by width - true by default.

methods.name: DownloadToASD
methods.description: Set true to download to ASD, or false to use Download directory.  - false by default.

methods.name: UploadFromASD
methods.description: Set true to upload from ASD, or false to use Shared directories.  - false by default.

blockProperties.name: TransparentBackground
blockProperties.description: make the background of the webview transparent

blockProperties.name: GetUserAgentString
blockProperties.description: Get the current setting for UserAgent in the webviewer

blockProperties.name: ZoomControls
blockProperties.description: Get the current setting for Zoom Controls in the webviewer

blockProperties.name: FileTypes
blockProperties.description: List of file types to select from

name: WebViewExtra
helpString:
Extension component for WebViewExtra. Created using Rush.

Written by Juan Antonio Villalpando & TIMAI2 with code and help from Kevinkun, Kumaraswamy and EWPatton .

Provides extra features for the webviewer, including... uploading and downloading files, READ & WRITE & MEDIA permissions for app, local/session storage, javascript, file access, modified userAgent, 3rd party cookies, Zoom Controls, Page Display options, Transparent Background option, Select upload and download location (ASD). .

More Info

events.name: BeforePicking
events.description: Do something before picking a file for upload, and returns filetype chosen for selecting file for upload

events.name: AfterPicking
events.description: Do something after selecting a file for upload, and returns filename AFTER selecting for upload

events.name: DownloadDataDebug
events.description: Returns download data, intended for developer use

events.name: Downloaded
events.description: Returns url and filename AFTER download
